summary: Smart Pet Care is a cross-platform React Native / Expo mobile app for managing pet health, reminders, and activity. It provides a tab-based UI with a Home dashboard (pet health carousel, AI insight card, today's reminders, quick-action shortcuts, and a recent-events timeline), placeholder Pets and Activity screens, and a Profile screen that demos UI primitives. The app talks to a backend REST API via an auto-generated, typed Axios + React Query client built from an OpenAPI spec. Authentication (register, login, Google OAuth, refresh, logout), user management, and reminder CRUD are all covered by the API contract. The UI design system is built on react-native-unistyles with a custom theme, and includes Button, Chip, Input, Select, Dialog, Drawer, Toast, FAB, TabBar, and a suite of SVG icon components.

Axios auth interceptors (Bearer token injection and 401 sign-out handler)
Session persistence in OS keychain via expo-secure-store
React Query client setup
Root app layout with font loading, splash screen, providers, and navigation stack
Tab navigation layout (Home, Pets, Activity, Profile) with FAB
Home screen – pet health carousel, AI insight, reminders, quick actions, timeline
Pets screen (placeholder)
Activity screen (placeholder)
Profile screen with UI primitive showcase (toast, dialog, drawer, input, chip)
Root redirect to home tab
Global app providers (QueryClient, GestureHandler, BottomSheetModal, Portal, Toast)
Floating Action Button (FAB) with animated menu of quick-action items
Custom tab bar component
Toast notification system (success, error, warning, info variants)
i18n internationalisation setup (English, common + home namespaces)
Unistyles theme and design-token configuration
Pet health data models (PetHealth, Reminder, AiInsight, TimelineEvent, etc.)
Home page mock data (pets, reminders, quick actions, timeline events, AI insight)
Pet health carousel with animated slides and dot indicator
HealthPetCard – per-pet health score and signal stats card
AddPetCard – CTA card in carousel to add a new pet
AI insight card with ask-assistant and dismiss actions
Today's reminders list with status toggle (done / pending / next)
Quick actions grid (log meal, note symptom, upload vet file, set reminder)
Recent events timeline
Home header with greeting and notifications button
Pet switcher dropdown (Select primitive)
Button UI primitive (variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger, text, icon)
Chip UI primitive (tone and variant system)
Dialog UI primitive (animated, portal-based)
Drawer / bottom-sheet UI primitive (Gorhom BottomSheetModal wrapper)
Input UI primitive (label, helper text, error state, slots)
Select / dropdown UI primitive
Text UI primitive with theme context
SVG icon library (activity, bell, briefcase-medical, calendar-heart, fish, hand, heart, home, pets, plus, stethoscope, syringe, thermometer, user, utensils, arrows)
Shared utilities (color interpolation, hex-to-rgba, daytime label)

docGaps: Generated API client usage and structure (src/api/generated/ is gitignored and undocumented beyond generation instructions)
